## ABOUT PJ MENTALINK CARE  & ROY COMFORT CARE CENTRE

## ​

## We promise we will provide quality care for our patients.

## 1) Home Cooked Food

##  2) Compassionate Staff

## 3) Hospitable Environment

  
 

## ROY COMFORT CARE CENTRE - PRemium HOME 

![RCC Entrance.webp](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5d36d1_58adee2415524669ac404e1cd3d01707~mv2.webp/v1/fill/w_400,h_295,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/RCC%20Entrance.webp)

![RCCC Living Hall.webp](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5d36d1_a6142fb27d874a51bfd98e32c3e09388~mv2.webp/v1/fill/w_400,h_295,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/RCCC%20Living%20Hall.webp)

NOW OPEN

1) We are a Mental Care Home in Petaling Jaya, Selangor.

2) We have branched out to Elderly Care, and we have 2 Old Folks Homes which is affiliated with our main home.

3) Located in the heart of Petaling Jaya, our mental care facility provides a home away from home for psychologically challenged residents. (Very near Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia)

4) PJ Mentalink Care accepts patients and acts like an Alcohol Rehab for certain types of patients.

5) PJ Mentalink Care has been successful in attracting and retaining skilled workers in fields like nursing and patient welfare. 

6) We strive to ensure our staff are attentive and caring at all times.

[![visitustoday.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/5d36d1_06127775b2e845a0918e21148664996d~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_371,h_135,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/visitustoday.png)](https://www.pjmentalinkcare.com/visit-us)
